design_philosophy: Comfortable density with explicit confirmation gates; careful pace over throughput for the Approver.
strengths: Per-row confirm before approve or reject; harder to act by mistake
Reason captured on every rejection so the audit trail explains the decision
Comfortable row spacing keeps each transaction easy to read
weaknesses: Slower for high-volume Approvers who handle dozens of rows per session
No bulk approve or reject; one transaction at a time
More clicks per decision than a keyboard-first dense layout
tradeoffs: Fewer mistakes per decision at the cost of throughput; suits sessions where each approval matters more than total volume processed.
use_when: Approvers handling high-stakes decisions where one wrong approval costs more than slower pace.
